title: Bluemap Player Visibility
description: Fabric mod to hide players on Bluemap
body:
# Bluemap Player Visibility

> If you want support for more versions, contact me on Discord: **danyaall**

This mod acts as an extension to Bluemap to remove players showing up on Bluemap 

**Fabric API** and **Bluemap** must already be installed for this to work.

| Command                 | Usage                                             | Requires OP |
|--------------------------|---------------------------------------------------|--------------|
| `/bmpv default <status>` | Used to change status for all new players         | Yes      |
| `/bmpv show <user>`      | Used to show a specific user on the Bluemap       | Only if specifiying a user that is not you        |
| `/bmpv hide <user>`      | Used to hide a specific user on the Bluemap       | Only if specifying a user that is not you        |

---

**NOTE: This mod may not be actively maintained as this mod was created for a quick resolution for a Minecraft SMP, I will try maintain this with version updates.**
